data.content: Removed transition-lock cruft: deleted isTransitionLocked, rollbackActivePhase, LABEL_TRANSITION_VERIFICATION, and TransitionLockBadge. Active beat states (planning, implementation, etc.) now display correctly in UI. All 1823 tests pass, lint/typecheck clean. Merged to main as 7a144716ca3176bd140402302139e97af9b20423.
